subject: chore(debug): harden separate root with ErrorBoundary + wire docs
body:
Strengthening pass on the web debug-root mount:

- Wrap <DebugPill /> in a local DebugRootBoundary class component.
  If the pill itself throws, the boundary renders a plain-DOM fallback
  badge (deliberately independent of RN/Uniwind so a styling failure
  can't also break the fallback) and records the crash in the debug
  log. Without this, a bug inside DebugPill would blank the separate
  root with no indication.
- Add uniwind-env.d.ts to tsconfig.json's explicit include list
  alongside expo-env.d.ts (robust against future include changes —
  was picked up via the **/*.ts glob before).
- CLAUDE.md architecture: list debugRootMount.web.tsx, the native
  stub, and uniwind-env.d.ts; update the debug-system project-status
  line to mention separate-root + boundary behaviour.
- SESSION_NOTES.md rewritten to snapshot this session.
- TESTING_GUIDE.md: new "Debug Pill Crash Survival (Web)" scenario
  covering DOM placement, page-component crash, and forced
  DebugPill-internal crash; regression checklist updated to match.

tsc --noEmit still 0 errors.

Tags: debug, resilience, docs, types
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: debug-pill-hardening
